title: The estimated rows of the where clause do not match expectations
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 FLOAT ZEROFILL DEFAULT 0.1283062654852083 );
UPDATE t0 SET c0=((t0.c0)REGEXP(true)) WHERE ((t0.c0) IS NULL);
ALTER TABLE t0 ADD PRIMARY KEY(c0);
UPDATE t0 SET c0=1 WHERE CAST(t0.c0 AS SIGNED);
ALTER TABLE t0  ORDER BY c0;
ALTER TABLE t0  DROP PRIMARY KEY;
ALTER TABLE t0  CHANGE c0 c0 FLOAT NOT NULL ;
key_bug_features: Estimated rows mismatch with and without where clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(id INT, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
EXPLAIN SELECT t1.value FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.ref_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.value HAVING COUNT(t1.id) > 1;
